title: cinnamomum wightii
intro: Cinnamomum wightii, also known as Indian bay leaf or Tejovati, is a plant species belonging to the family Lauraceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cinnamomum wightii include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and aiding in respiratory problems. Cinnamomum wightii is used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
